privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.intro: At JobyNow, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our recruitment platform.
privacy_policy.personal_info_desc: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:
privacy_policy.auto_info_desc: When you access our platform, we automatically collect certain information about your device, including information about your web browser, IP address, time zone, and cookies installed on your device.
privacy_policy.usage_desc: We use the information we collect to:
privacy_policy.security_desc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy_policy.rights_desc: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal information:
privacy_policy.contact_desc: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:
privacy_policy.updates: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.

terms_of_service.title: Terms of Service
terms_of_service.intro: Welcome to JobyNow. These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of our recruitment platform.
terms_of_service.acceptance_desc: By creating an account or using our platform, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy.
terms_of_service.registration_desc: To access certain features of our platform, you must register for an account. You agree to:
terms_of_service.account_types_desc: JobyNow offers two types of accounts: Candidate accounts for job seekers and Enterprise accounts for employers.
terms_of_service.conduct_desc: You agree not to use the platform to:
terms_of_service.termination_desc: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time, with or without notice.
terms_of_service.disclaimer_desc: The platform is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind.
terms_of_service.liability_desc: To the maximum extent permitted by law, JobyNow shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.
terms_of_service.law_desc: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Morocco.
terms_of_service.changes_desc: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time.
terms_of_service.contact_desc: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
terms_of_service.acknowledgment: By using JobyNow, you acknowledge that you have read and understood these Terms of Service and agree to be bound by them.

cookie_policy.title: Cookie Policy
cookie_policy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how JobyNow uses cookies and similar tracking technologies when you visit our recruitment platform.
cookie_policy.what_are_desc: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.
cookie_policy.essential_desc: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core functionality such as security, network management, and accessibility.
cookie_policy.performance_desc: These cookies collect information about how you use our website, such as which pages you visit most often. This data helps us improve our website's performance.
cookie_policy.functional_desc: These cookies allow the website to remember choices you make (such as your language preference) and provide enhanced, more personalized features.
cookie_policy.targeting_desc: These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant ads on other sites.
cookie_policy.third_party_desc: Some cookies on our site are set by third-party services that appear on our pages. We do not control these cookies.
cookie_policy.management_desc: You can control and manage cookies in various ways. Please note that removing or blocking cookies can impact your user experience.
cookie_policy.browser_settings: Most web browsers allow you to manage cookies through their settings. You can set your browser to refuse cookies or delete certain cookies.
cookie_policy.contact_desc: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at:
